author: goberomsu
description: Upload images to Eagle and manage them alongside your vault. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Beomsu Koh
manifest.description: Upload images to Eagle and manage them alongside your vault.
manifest.name: Eagle Integration

name: Eagle Integration

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Release 2.9.8

## Summary
- Centralized Eagle cache path, item id, extension, and wikilink sanitization.
- Hardened cache writers and upload/import flows against unsafe file/link segments.
- Updated the Obsidian runtime verify harness to validate the current manifest id and sanitized cache wikilink output.

releases.author: GoBeromsu
releases.description:
## Changes
- Unified Eagle library search + picker into a single modal (`EagleSearchPickerModal`).
- Removed implicit single-result auto insert; selection is now always explicit.
- Added debounced in-modal search (300ms), Enter-triggered immediate search, and fixed result limit at 100.
- Hardened thumbnail rendering with metadata path normalization + fallback thumbnail API loading.
- Added optional diagnostics toggle (`Search diagnostics (debug)`) to trace search/thumbnail resolution.
- Improved Eagle search result normalization for alternate thumbnail fields (`thumbnail`, `thumb`, `thumbnailPath`, `preview`, `previewPath`).
- Added regression/unit tests for thumbnail URL handling, search normalization, and single-result explicit-selection behavior.

## Validation
- `pnpm run test`
- `pnpm run build`
- targeted `eslint` on changed files
releases.name: v2.0.10

releases.author: GoBeromsu
releases.description:
Fix: Normalize Eagle API paths before file URL conversion to avoid double-encoding for non-ASCII filenames when importing from Eagle.

## Fixed
- Add normalizeEagleApiPathToFileUrl() to normalize API thumbnail/file paths.
- Update getFileUrlForItemId to use normalized path conversion.
- Ensure search-import preserves working markdown rule: ![eagle:<itemId>](file://...).

## Notes
- Existing update-image-path commands remain compatible.
releases.name: v2.0.5

releases.author: GoBeromsu
releases.description:
Fix: Replace unsupported window.prompt in Eagle image import search flow with Obsidian modal so search/import command works in Electron environments.

## Changes
- Added search keyword modal for "Eagle: Insert image from Eagle (search)" command
- Kept import format `![eagle:<itemId>](file://...)` unchanged for path update compatibility
- Kept keyword search behavior (title/annotation/tags via /api/item/list)

## Notes
- If Eagle is not running, command still fails gracefully with Notice.
releases.name: v2.0.4

releases.author: GoBeromsu
releases.description:
# Eagle Plugin 2.0.3

## Added
- Add command **Eagle: Insert image from Eagle (search)** to search Eagle library items and insert selected images into the current note.

This command allows you to:
- Search by title/annotation/tag via existing Eagle keyword search
- Select an image from Fuzzy modal and insert `![eagle:<itemId>](file://...)` at cursor
- Preserve existing path re-resolution workflow

releases.author: GoBeromsu
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- Added configurable fallback format for unsupported image uploads (`jpeg`/`png`/`webp`).
- Added HEIC/HEIF/비호환 포맷 판별 및 설정 기반 변환 기능.
- Conversion 실패 시 기존 업로드 실패 처리 흐름을 유지합니다.
- JPEG 품질 설정(`conversionQualityForJpeg`)을 추가했습니다.

### Notes
- 기존 렌더링 가능한 PNG/JPEG/WEBP/GIF/BMP/SVG 포맷은 포맷 변환 없이 업로드합니다.
- 비호환 포맷(예: HEIC)은 선택한 fallback 포맷으로 재인코딩됩니다.
releases.name: obsidian-eagle-plugin v2.0.2

releases.author: GoBeromsu
releases.description:
## v2.0.1

- Fix: percent-encode `file://` URLs (spaces/unicode/parentheses) so Obsidian renders embeds reliably.
- Add: store Eagle item IDs in markdown alt text (`![eagle:<id>]`) for portability.
- Add: commands to re-resolve embedded image paths (current note / entire vault).

See CHANGELOG for details.
releases.name: v2.0.1
